Built for Cloudflare Workers

This showcase demonstrates modern web design principles with glassmorphism effects, optimized for deployment on Cloudflare Workers. Every component is crafted with performance and aesthetics in mind.

⚡ Lightning fast performance
📱 Fully responsive design
🎨 Modern glassmorphism effects
🔧 Cloudflare Workers ready
